flags.message: The provisioned petition.txt is empty (documents.json marks it empty_text: true — a 37-page scanned filing with no text layer), so the questions presented could not be read. The prediction rests on the docket snapshot, CourtListener metadata for the lower-court record, and statpack base rates; given the overwhelmingly negative structural signals (pro se, all responses waived, no CFR, long-conference distribution) the missing text is unlikely to change the call.
